tangs_acanthurus.note: Same-genus aggression severe; Powder Blue worst

tangs_zebrasoma.note: Cross-genus tangs OK in 125g+ added together

tangs_ctenochaetus.note: Different shape but similar feeding niche

rabbitfish_siganus.note: Algae-grazing niche overlap; works in 125g+ added together
Algae-grazing niche overlap; works in 125g+ added together
Niche overlap, less aggressive than vs Acanthurus/Zebrasoma

tangs_paracanthurus.note: Single Hippo per tank; multiple in 200g+ added simultaneously

dwarf_angels_centropyge.note: Harem (3+) in 100g+ added together; Flame goes last

rabbitfish_siganus.note: Some niche overlap on algae; usually fine

large_angels_pomacanthus.note: Single per tank typically; 300g+ to attempt

large_angels_holacanthus.note: Single per tank; Rock Beauty has dietary issues

large_angels_pomacanthus.note: Pomacanthus too aggressive for delicate Genicanthus

genicanthus_angels.note: Acclimation box if not adding simultaneously; jockey for dominance

wrasses_halichoeres.note: Different species OK if added together; same species pair-only

wrasses_anampses.note: Anampses sensitive next to active Halichoeres

wrasses_paracheilinus.note: Multi-male harems work in 75g+ when added together

wrasses_macropharyngodon.note: Sensitive; sand bed required; add simultaneously

damsels_chrysiptera.note: Springeri/Talbot/Rolland's peaceful in groups; Yellowtail (parasema) more aggressive

clownfish.note: Pair only, conspecific only; Maroon especially aggressive

gobies_cryptocentrus.note: Territorial; pairs only when shrimp-paired together

gobies_nemateleotris.note: Pair or group only if added together

lionfish.note: Lionfish may try but venomous fang deters
Possible if added together, similar size, large tank

dottybacks.note: Aggressive; peaceful exceptions are Elongatus, Coccinacauda

mandarins_dragonets.note: Pair only (M+F); single best for most tanks

tangs_acanthurus.note: Algae-grazing niche overlap; works in 125g+ added together

tangs_zebrasoma.note: Algae-grazing niche overlap; works in 125g+ added together

tangs_ctenochaetus.note: Niche overlap, less aggressive than vs Acanthurus/Zebrasoma

dwarf_angels_centropyge.note: Some niche overlap on algae; usually fine

rabbitfish_siganus.note: Single only or co-introduced pair; same-genus aggression
